titleStmt.title: SII 24.265: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 265. (A.R. No. 67 of 1892.) SAME WALL.

summary.p: Registers a gift of land by purchase from the Śrīvaishṇavas of the temple for gardening by Nallūr Tuppa-Nāyakkaṉ, a Kudiraichcheṭṭi of Malaimaṇḍalam to Tiruvaravaṇai-Niṟaindār, son of Śrīraṅgarāja Brahmādhirājar of Tiruvaḻundūr, and a nambi serving the god (Śrīpādantāṅgum), towards offering of garlands for his own merit, The record is dated in the 2nd year of king Rāma nātha and the details of the date viz. Kuṁbha, śu. 7, Wednesday, Bharaṇi correspond to A.D. 1256, February 4, Friday, (not Wednesday), ·70; ·11.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīḥ . sārvabhauma śrīmat pratāpacakravattikaḷ poycaḷa śrī vīrarāma nātha devaṟku yāṇṭu Iraṇṭāvatu kumbhanāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu saptamiyum
budhaṉ kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa bharaṇi nāḷ tiruvaraṅkan tiruppatiyil śrī pādantāṅkum nampimāril tiruvaḻuntūr śrī raṅgarājabrahmādhirājar
makaṉ tiruvaravaṇai niṟaintāṟku malaimaṇṭalattuk kutiraic ceṭṭikaḷil nallūrt tuppanāyakkaṉeṉ kalveṭṭikkuṭutta paricāvatu
Eṉakku naṉṟāka Aḻakiya maṇavāḷap perumāḷukkuc cātti Aruḷa Ittiruvaravaṇai niṟaintār Eṭukkiṟa tirumālai Iraṇṭukku palavaṟkattut tirup
paḷḷittāmam vaittu Ākkavum tiruppaḷḷittāmamum Ākkat tirunantavaṉamum ceykiṟa tiruvaravaṇai niṟaintāṟkku jivaṉattukku Uṭalāka It
tiruppati śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷil kumāṇṭur Iṭavai Irācamentiranampi pakkal tirukkuṟaip paṟṟil teṉ Oḻukiliṭavai Aḻakiya maṇavāḷa nampi tiru
nantavaṉattukku meṟku vetaneṟi kāṭṭiṉān tiruttukku vaṭakku(n)t tiruvaḻuntūr vaṭakopurattāḻvi tirunantavaṉattukku kiḻakku meṟkkuṉokki
pokiṟa peruvaḻikkut teṟku ṉaṭuvu Uṭpaṭṭa tirunantavaṉam kiḻaimel kol 3ipama Ittirunantavaṉam kol muṉṟaraiye mākāṇiyāluḷḷa
tiruppaḷḷittāma mānilaippuñceyum viḷainilamum melṉokkiṉa maramum kiḻṉokkiṉa kiṇaṟum Uṭpaṭa nāṉ vilai koṇṭapaṭi
ye Ittiruvaravaṇai niṟaintāṟku tirunantavaṉamākavum tirunantavaṉappuṟamākavum kuṭuttu Ippaṭi candrādityavarai celvatāka kal veṭṭikkuṭutteṉ nallūr tuppanāyakkaṉeṉ .§ Itu śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷ rakṣai .§
Digital edition of SII 24.265 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
